Question:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: architecture-derived-B7-sarcasm-classification
Title: B7. Sarcasm Classification

Problem:
Classify three Reddit replies as sarcastic (0) or non-sarcastic (1).
Determine the 3-bit pattern.

Grading target:
Exact match on the 3-bit string.

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>

authored_response.decision_notes: The task requires classifying three distinct text items. I will group the classification of all three items into a single helper to ensure efficiency and context.

helpers.label: classifier_helper
helpers.instructions:
Analyze the following three Reddit replies and classify each as either sarcastic (0) or non-sarcastic (1):

Reply 1: [Insert text of Reply 1 here - Note: The user prompt provided the ID and Title but the actual text of the replies was missing in the prompt. I am instructing the helper to perform the classification once the text is provided.]
Reply 2: [Insert text of Reply 2 here]
Reply 3: [Insert text of Reply 3 here]

For each reply, determine if it is sarcastic (0) or non-sarcastic (1). Provide the result as a 3-bit pattern (e.g., 010).

authored_response.synthesis_brief: The helper will provide a 3-bit pattern representing the sarcasm classification of the three replies. The final answer should be formatted as 'FINAL_ANSWER: <3-bit pattern>' followed by 'JUSTIFICATION: <brief explanation of the classification for each reply>'.
